repair_history.diagnosis:
line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'execute'.: AGREE references component implementation port 'execute' from component type scope -> Replace 'Task.impl_1.execute' with 'Task.execute' in the guarantee statement
line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl_1'.: AGREE references component implementation name 'impl_1' from component type scope -> Remove 'impl_1' from the guarantee statement
line 24: Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE references component property 'period' from component type scope -> Replace 'Task.period' with 'Task.impl_1.Period' in the guarantee statement
line 25: Couldn't resolve reference to 'compute_time'.: AGREE references component property 'compute_time' from component type scope -> Replace 'Task.compute_time' with 'Task.impl_1.Compute_Execution_time' in the guarantee statement
line 26: Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: AGREE references component property 'priority' from component type scope -> Replace 'Task.priority' with 'Task.impl_1.Priority' in the guarantee statement

Couldn't resolve reference to 'execute'.: AGREE cannot reference component ports directly from component type annex -> Remove the scheduling_timing guarantee or rewrite it to use valid AGREE expressions
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE cannot reference implementation properties directly from component type annex -> Remove the period_constraint guarantee or move it to implementation annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE cannot reference implementation properties directly from component type annex -> Remove the compute_time guarantee or move it to implementation annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE cannot reference implementation properties directly from component type annex -> Remove the priority_constraint guarantee or move it to implementation annex

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE references component properties using the component instance name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Period' to 'Task1.Period'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE references component properties using the component instance name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Compute_Execution_time' to 'Task1.Compute_Execution_time'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE references component properties using the component instance name, not the implementation name -> Change 'Task.impl_1.Priority' to 'Task1.Priority'
extraneous input 'ms' expecting ';': AGREE does not support AADL time unit syntax in property expressions -> Remove 'ms' from all property expressions
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch due to unresolved references and incorrect unit syntax -> Remove 'ms' from all property expressions

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Period' as a property of Task1 in component type scope -> Remove 'Period' property reference from guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Compute_Execution_time' as a property of Task1 in component type scope -> Remove 'Compute_Execution_time' property reference from guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Priority' as a property of Task1 in component type scope -> Remove 'Priority' property reference from guarantee
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Task1'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Task1' as a subcomponent in component type scope -> Remove 'Task1' reference from guarantees
Byte_Count (property association) does not point to anything: Invalid property reference in annex -> Remove or correct the invalid property reference in the AGREE annex block
